description: Add required `id: string` field to `TabContent` interface in CustomTabs.tsx
CustomTabs uses `tab.id` (not `tab.label`) as Radix Tabs `value` prop for triggers and content panels
CustomTabs uses `tab.id` as React `key` prop for triggers and content panels
CustomTabs `onTabChange` callback fires with `tab.id` string
CustomTabs `defaultTab` and `value` props match against `tab.id`
CustomTabs `beforeTabChange` callback receives `tab.id` values
CustomTabs auto-expand section logic matches `tab.id === defaultTab` and `tab.id === value`
CustomTabs still renders `tab.label` as display text in trigger buttons
CustomTabs uncontrolled default falls back to `allTabs[0].id` when no defaultTab provided
